metadata.title: Features — Remix
metadata.description: Remix is more than an IDE — it's your gateway to building the decentralized future.

hero.description: Remix is more than an IDE — it's your gateway to building the decentralized future.

tabs.label: What's New
tabs.description: New features are launched often, keeping Remix working with the latest Web3 technology.

cards.title: RemixAI Features
cards.description: Get compiler errors explained and fixed, AI code generation/completion, and AI code requests using the LLMs you already depend on.

cards.title: Remix Desktop
cards.description: Remix with the stability and security of your hard drive. Native terminal. Realtime code syncing with any Editor. Use the wallet and connection of your choice.

cards.title: Account Abstraction with ERC-4337
cards.description: Create a Gnosis Safe Account connected to the Gnosis Chain.

cards.title: Smart Accounts with EIP-7702
cards.description: Easily connect an EOA to a smart contract and start experimenting.

cards.title: ZK Circuit Compilers
cards.description: Circom and Noir integrations. Remix's easy UX will get you understanding ZK proofs and writing circuits as fast as possible.

cards.title: Remix Video Guide
cards.description: Search and view embedded videos on Remix features and Solidity.

tabs.label: Coding
tabs.description: Code in Solidity, JS/TS, Vyper, and more to get the advantages of building in an integrated Web3 environment.

cards.title: AI in the Editor
cards.description: Code requests, code completion, and code explanations to magnify what you can achieve.

cards.title: Integrated Debugger with Editor
cards.description: Input breakpoints and get line-by-line and opcode-by-opcode gas reporting.

cards.title: Remix Desktop
cards.description: Access to the native terminal. Code in VSCode or Cursor and live sync with Remix Desktop for Web3 tools. Connect with any wallet.

cards.title: ZK Circuits with Circom or Noir
cards.description: With the Remix UX, learn, code and deploy ZK Circuits. Use Remix Desktop to power through larger ZK Proofs.

cards.title: Code in Multiple Languages
cards.description: Yul, Vyper, and Rust are all available in plugins.

cards.title: Run Free Functions
cards.description: Sometimes a function outside of a contract is needed. In Remix, running Free Functions is easy.

tabs.label: Integrated Workflows
tabs.description: Remix is a toolset that easily integrates with the tools you already use.

cards.title: Git Integration
cards.description: Remix Git integration includes the Git plugin, and extends the File Explorer to clone repos, manage branches, and publish GISTs.

cards.title: Security Tools
cards.description: Remix integrates Slither, SolHint, SolidityScan, Cookbook, BuildBear and Tenderly.

cards.title: Hardhat / Foundry in Remix Desktop
cards.description: Work on Hardhat or Foundry projects within Remix. Use HardHat or Foundry to compile and test, and Remix to debug and deploy.

cards.title: Remix and Cursor
cards.description: Code in your favorite Editor and use Remix Desktop for its Web3 tools.

cards.title: Remix with URL Parameters
cards.description: Load a GitHub folder with the ghfolder= url parameter. Full list of available parameters available here.

cards.title: Editor / Debugger Integration
cards.description: Input breakpoints and get line-by-line and opcode-by-opcode gas reporting.

tabs.label: Deploying
tabs.description: Remix makes deploying and interacting with contracts clear and tangible.

cards.title: Public Chains
cards.description: Deploy with WalletConnect, a browser wallet, or a node provider and then pin it!

cards.title: Remix VM
cards.description: Remix's simulated chain is pre-loaded with 10 accounts and can fork other chains, pin contracts, and save and share blockchain state.

cards.title: Contract Verification
cards.description: Verify contracts on Etherscan, Sourcify, Blockscout, and Routescan in one click.

cards.title: Create a Front-end Dapp
cards.description: QuickDapp can deploy a website with any or all of a contract's functions.

cards.title: Graphic UI for UUPS Proxy Contracts
cards.description: Remix's easy interface for the UUPS proxy pattern can deploy, interact with, and upgrade contracts.

cards.title: Scientific Notation
cards.description: Use scientific notation in a deployed contract's function inputs.

tabs.label: Scripting
tabs.description: Remix is famous for its graphic interface, but running scripts in Remix can speed up your workflow.

cards.title: TS / JS Scripting
cards.description: Run Ethers or any other JS/TS scripts.

cards.title: Unit Testing
cards.description: Remix is versatile: Unit test with Mocha tests or Solidity unit tests.

cards.title: Script Dependencies
cards.description: Easily choose the dependencies for your scripts. New options are added consistently.

cards.title: Compile and Run
cards.description: In the Solidity Compiler, the Compile and Run script button sets the state of a contract with a script just after a successful compilation.

cards.title: Transaction Recorder
cards.description: In the Deploy and Run plugin, transactions can be recorded, saved in a JSON file, and replayed in another context.

cards.title: Console.log
cards.description: Console.log is available for printing out variables.

tabs.label: Debugging & Optimizations
tabs.description: Remix provides best-in-class debugging tools to understand, optimize, and secure your smart contracts.

cards.title: Remix Debugger: Industry Favorite
cards.description: Step through OpCodes, use breakpoints, check gas usage, and debug deployed verified contracts with an intuitive interface.

cards.title: AI-Assisted Debugging
cards.description: Use the power of your favorite LLM to explain and fix errors and catch security holes.

cards.title: Debug Verified Contracts
cards.description: With just a transaction hash, you can debug a verified contract on Etherscan.

cards.title: Gas Reporting
cards.description: Compiling a contract prints out gas use per function. Stepping through a transaction in the Debugger shows gas use with its OpCode per line.

cards.title: Integrated Analysis Tools
cards.description: Remix integrates Slither, SolHint, SolidityScan, and Tenderly.

cards.title: Get Low Level
cards.description: The Remix Debugger shows everything from global variables, call data, and memory, to the call stack.
